text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and as I'm thinking about what
goals to set for Mejiro Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Should we start with muscle training? Or how
about some celebratory New Year's yoga?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
None of the above? So you probably wanna plot
out this year's goals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's aim big. How about we set our
sights on succeeding in the Classics?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I thought that was pretty lofty already.
Okay then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll massively build my hamstring strength! How's
that for a goal, huh? Hehe.
choice_data_list:
Bigger! What about becoming Triple Crown
Champion?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urk! D-definitely a big one. I don't think I have
the confidence for that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm going to enter the Classics to beat
McQueen, of course...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But ever since I was little, I've been setting goals
too high just for them to end in failure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It will be a tough task to get past her bad
experiences. But still... there must be something
we can do.
choice_data_list: Let's try for something just a little bigger then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Got it... We'll think about this together, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Have you come up with anything? If so, then
lemme hear it! My big goal, in three, two, one!
choice_data_list: Start thinking about the big picture!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
F-f-fall in love?! I have to burn mad with
passion... as a goal?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But I've... I've never even had a crush...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan screams and runs off. I wonder what's going
on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No way, no way, no way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: No way, no how... That's so embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm way too shy for thaaat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We try all kinds of exercises to get rid of her
shyness. As a result, her performance seems to
improve.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Swagger? I see... So you think I should do things
that make an impression, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ooh yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Traineerrr! Hey, Trainer. Take a look at this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I laid out this huge banner that says "GO! GO!
RYAN!" Isn't it swaggy?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, a big job with a big banner under the big,
blue sky! I'm feeling great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I say carry herself with swagger, but she makes
some swag to carry around instead. Still, Ryan
looks very pleased with herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The big picture? That's kind of hard to grasp.
How do I do that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Should I look at something bigger? In that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The planetarium! This is the place to be when you
wanna look at the stars and feel something huge!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... That couple over there seems to be in a
good mood. Wait, a-are they saying how much
they like each other? Agh, my heart...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at the stars—and the various couples
around us—seems to have expanded her thinking
a little.
